title: 부천일신중 2학년 영어 1학기 기말 모의고사 5회
subject: 영어
passage:
의사소통기능
⦁ 외모 묘사하기
A: What does your best friend look like?
B: She is tall and has big eyes.

⦁ 성격 묘사하기
A: What is she like?
B: She is active and funny.

언어 형식
⦁ 주격 관계대명사
Some animals which live in the wild are good at camouflage.

⦁ 5형식 동사
Their special looks keep them safe from predators.

---

Topic 1 A, B: 친구와 할머니, 애완견 묘사하기
Minjin, what does your best friend look like?
My best friend Somi is tall with long curly hair.
What is she like?
She is very active and nice. She helps everyone in our class.

---

본문: Can You Spot Them?

Are you good at hide and seek? Some animals which live in the wild are very good at camouflage. You can see them in the air, on land, and in the sea. Their special looks or abilities keep them safe from predators. Let me guide you through the world of animal camouflage.

Mountain Hare

Mountain hares are like rabbits, but they are bigger and have longer legs. They are very stylish animals. Mountain hares change colors according to season. In summer, they turn gray-brown to match the rocks and grass. In winter, they turn white to camouflage themselves in the snow. Changing colors makes them nearly invisible to predators like wild dogs and eagles.

Did you know?
Mountain hares have really big feet. Thanks to them, mountain hares can hop in deep snow and escape from predators.

---

의사소통기능
⦁ 길 묻고 답하기
A: How can I get to the museum?
B: Go straight two blocks and make a left.

⦁ 소요시간 말하기
A: How long will it take to get there?
B: It will take about 15 minutes.

언어 형식
⦁ 현재 완료
I have known her since I was 10 years old.

⦁ ask/tell/want + 목적어 + to부정사
Amelia told me to try the fish and chips.

---

Topic 1 A, B: 길 묻기와 소요시간
B: Excuse me. How can I get to the post office?
G: Go straight one block. Then make a right. It will be on your left.
B: How long will it take to get there?
G: It will take only 5 minutes.

---

본문: See You in London!

I can't wait to tell you about my trip to London. The flight took 15 hours from Incheon. When I met my friend Amelia at the airport, I was so excited. I have known her since I was 10 years old. She took me to many places in London. Come with me on my amazing trip!

Beautiful Palace

We got on the famous red bus and the first stop was Buckingham Palace. The King and his family live there. We saw the King's Guard. The guards were wearing red jackets and tall black hats. We took pictures near them, but they didn't smile or move. They were like statues!

Yummy Meal

Next, we went to Camden Market. This market is known for its food from around the world. Amelia told me to try the fish and chips. I thought, "How strange! I have eaten fish many times before...

questions.question: 다음 중 'What does ... look like?'로 물어볼 수 있는 것은?
'Somi is tall with long curly hair'는 무엇을 설명하는가?
관계대명사 'which'가 올바르게 사용된 문장은?
'I have known her since I was 10'은 현재완료가 맞는가?
'tell + 목적어 + to부정사' 구조의 의미는?
'Go straight two blocks and make a left'에서 진행 순서는?
questions.explanation: 먼저 2블록을 똑바로 간 후 왼쪽으로 돕니다.

questions.question: 'How long will it take?'의 예상 답변은?
'She is active and nice'는 무엇을 설명하는가?
관계절 'which live in the wild'를 제거하면?
'Mountain hares'의 가장 큰 특징은?
Subin의 런던 여행에서 가장 인상적인 장면은?
'I can't wait to'의 의미로 가장 가까운 표현은?
questions.explanation: 'can't wait to'는 '~하고 싶어 열심히 기다린다'는 의미입니다.

questions.question: 현재완료의 핵심 특징은?
'I have visited Paris three times'에서 'three times'는?
길 안내에서 'block'은 무엇을 의미하는가?
'They were like statues'는 무엇을 의미하는가?
'Amelia told me to try the fish and chips'의 'Amelia'는 누구인가?
questions.explanation: 본문: 'my friend Amelia' 그리고 '10살부터 알고 있던 친구'

questions.question: 의사소통 기능의 예로 올바른 것은?
questions.explanation: 의사소통 기능은 '외모 묘사하기', '길 묻기' 등 실제 사용입니다.

questions.question: 언어 형식의 예로 올바른 것은?
다음 중 5형식 문장은?
외모 묘사와 성격 묘사의 차이를 설명하고 각각 예를 드세요.
questions.answer: 외모 묘사: 신체 특징 (예: tall, thin, big eyes) / 성격 묘사: 성격 특성 (예: kind, funny, active)

questions.question: 관계대명사 'which'와 선행사의 관계를 설명하고 예를 드세요.
questions.answer: 'which'는 직전의 물건 명사(선행사)를 수식합니다. 예: 'The book which I read is interesting' - 'which'가 'book'을 수식

questions.question: 현재완료 'I have lived here for 5 years'를 과거형 문장으로 바꾸고, 의미 변화를 설명하세요.
questions.answer: 'I lived here for 5 years' - 현재완료는 현재도 살고 있음, 과거형은 더 이상 살지 않음을 의미

questions.question: 'tell + 목적어 + to부정사'를 사용하여 문장을 만들고, 의미를 설명하세요.
questions.answer: 'She told him to study hard' - 그녀가 그에게 열심히 공부하도록 말했다는 뜻

questions.question: Lesson 3과 Lesson 4의 의사소통 기능과 언어 형식을 각각 정리하세요.
questions.answer: Lesson 3: 기능(외모/성격 묘사), 형식(관계대명사, 5형식) / Lesson 4: 기능(길 묻기, 소요시간 말하기), 형식(현재완료, ask/tell/want + to부정사)
